zh.lifeSummary: Miguel Nightingale是Nightingale的兒子，於1558年出生在英國英格蘭艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登。他於大約1583年與Ann Haggar在英國英格蘭艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1614年在英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Nightingale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with a good voice, from Middle English nightegale ‘nightingale’ (Old English nihtegale, from niht ‘night’ + galan ‘sing’). The bird is known as a sweet singer.
Probably an Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Nachtigall  , or cognates in other languages.

variants.name: Nachtigall
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Arno, Fritz, Guenter, Hedwig, Konrad.
German: nickname from Middle High German nachtegal ‘nightingale’ (from Old High German nacht ‘night ’+ galan ‘to sing’), probably denoting a good singer.

nameMeanings.name: Miguel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Michael
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: Miguel Nightingale was born in 1558, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the son of Nightingale. He married Ann Haggar about 1583, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died in 1614, in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

Il a épousé Ann Haggar environ 1583, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1614, à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Miguel Nightingaleは1558年にイギリスイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンでNightingaleの息子として生まれた。約1583年にイギリスイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンでAnn Haggarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1614年にイギリスイギリスエセックスサクステドで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Miguel Nightingale(은)는 1558년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 사프런 월든에서 Nightingale의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1583년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 사프런 월든에서 Ann Haggar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1614년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스액테드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Miguel Nightingale родился в 1558 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Nightingale. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Haggar около 1583 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер в 1614 г. в местности такстед, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.
